languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

languages.text: "Итак, о Нунциусе. Кем же на самом деле является твой загадочный собеседник? В ответе нет нужды — мне попросту нравится твоя боль, возникающая всякий раз, когда я задаю этот вопрос".
"So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."
languages.original_text: "Итак, о Нунциусе. Кем же на самом деле является твой загадочный собеседник? В ответе нет нужды — мне попросту нравится твоя боль, возникающая всякий раз, когда я задаю этот вопрос".

traits.locale_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."
"So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."
"So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

languages.text: «Bueno... Nuncius. ¿Quién es realmente ese interlocutor misterioso tuyo? No hace falta que respondas; disfruto de la punzada de dolor que sientes cada vez que lo pregunto».
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: «Bueno... Nuncius. ¿Quién es realmente ese interlocutor misterioso tuyo? No hace falta que respondas; disfruto de la punzada de dolor que sientes cada vez que lo pregunto».

languages.text: 「さて……ヌンキウス。お前の謎めいた対話者とは、真に何者なのだ？ 答える必要はない――俺はただ、その問いを発するたびにお前が感じる、疼くような痛みを味わって楽しんでいるだけだからな」
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: 「さて……ヌンキウス。お前の謎めいた対話者とは、真に何者なのだ？ 答える必要はない――俺はただ、その問いを発するたびにお前が感じる、疼くような痛みを味わって楽しんでいるだけだからな」

languages.text: “……努恩修斯。你那个神秘的谈话对象究竟是谁？不必回答——我只是在享受你此刻所感受到的那种痛苦悸动。”
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: “……努恩修斯。你那个神秘的谈话对象究竟是谁？不必回答——我只是在享受你此刻所感受到的那种痛苦悸动。”

languages.text: "Also ... Nuncius. Wer ist Euer geheimnisvoller Gesprächspartner wirklich? Spart Euch die Antwort ... ich werde einfach den Schmerz genießen, den Euch diese Frage bereitet."
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: "Also ... Nuncius. Wer ist Euer geheimnisvoller Gesprächspartner wirklich? Spart Euch die Antwort ... ich werde einfach den Schmerz genießen, den Euch diese Frage bereitet."

languages.text: « Et donc, à propos de Nuncius... Qui est vraiment votre mystérieux interlocuteur ? Inutile de répondre. Je me délecte simplement de cette pulsation douloureuse qui vous envahit chaque fois que je pose la question. »
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: « Et donc, à propos de Nuncius... Qui est vraiment votre mystérieux interlocuteur ? Inutile de répondre. Je me délecte simplement de cette pulsation douloureuse qui vous envahit chaque fois que je pose la question. »

languages.text: "Yani... Nuncius. Sizin şu gizemli muhatabın aslında kim? Cevap vermene gerek yok.O soruyu ne zaman sorsam hissettiğin o acının sızısından zevk alıyorum."
languages.original_text: "So... Nuncius. Who is your mysterious interlocutor truly? No need to answer — I simply relish the throb of pain you feel whenever I ask that question."

traits.locale_text: "Yani... Nuncius. Sizin şu gizemli muhatabın aslında kim? Cevap vermene gerek yok.O soruyu ne zaman sorsam hissettiğin o acının sızısından zevk alıyorum."
